edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT
edges.description: Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base checkpoint and continues with supervised fine-tuning.
description_variants: Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base checkpoint and continues with supervised fine-tuning.
Olmo 3 Think 7B SFT is initialized from the Olmo 3 7B Base (long-context-extended) checkpoint allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B before supervised finetuning on Dolci Think SFT.
The 7B Think SFT checkpoint is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base model, per the Model Family table on the dataset card.
Think SFT 7B is initialized from the Olmo 3 Base 7B (1025) checkpoint after midtraining and long-context extension before supervised finetuning on Dolci Think SFT.

Olmo 3 7B Think SFT initialized from the Olmo 3 Base 7B (post midtraining + long-context); SFT runs for 2 epochs with 1M-token batches and 32K seq length, and the final checkpoint is a souped merge of two LR-sweep checkpoints.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from the Olmo-3-7B (Olmo-3-1025-7B) base checkpoint per the Model Family table that lists Olmo-3-7B as the Base Model for the 7B Think SFT stage.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from a long-context (yarn 64k, round-5) post-training base checkpoint that descends from the Olmo-3 1025 7B base lineage (olmo25_7b_lc_64k_6T_M100B_round5 yarn-fullonly).
Olmo 3 7B Think SFT is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base (post long-context Stage 3) and supervised fine-tuned on Dolci-Think-SFT-7B for 2 epochs.

Warm-starts from the long-context Olmo-2.5 7B 6T-token round-5 YaRN checkpoint (internal weka path); the closest released ancestor in the lattice is allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B (this internal checkpoint is the long-context base used for the Olmo 3 series).
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT initializes from the Olmo 3 Base 7B (Olmo-3-1025-7B) checkpoint per the Olmo 3 model flow (Figure 2).
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base checkpoint per the Model Family table in the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B card.
The 7B Think-SFT checkpoint is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B long-context base.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT initializes weights from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base model (Olmo-core SFT script Olmo-3-7B-SFT.py loads a base checkpoint via the BASE_CKPT argument).

The SFT script initializes weights from the OLMo 3 7B base midtraining checkpoint at /weka/oe-training-default/ai2-llm/checkpoints/tylerr/long-context/olmo25_7b_lc_64k_6T_M100B_round5-...-fb13a737/step11921, which corresponds to the publicly released allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B base.
Initialized from a long-context-extended OLMo-3-1025-7B base (olmo25_7b_lc_64k_6T_M100B_round5 step11921) — the 7B base after long-context-extension (YARN, 64k), prior to post-training.
7B Think SFT initializes from the Olmo 3 7B base checkpoint (allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B) and is supervised-finetuned on Dolci Think SFT.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is the SFT post-training checkpoint warm-started from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base model per the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B card's Model Family table.
Think-SFT 7B is initialized from the Olmo-3 7B base (post long-context).
Think SFT warm-starts from a long-context OLMo-2.5/3 7B base yarn-fullonly checkpoint (olmo25_7b_lc_64k_6T_M100B_round5-...-step11921), the long-context base of the released OLMo-3 7B Base.
Olmo 3 7B Think SFT is initialized from the Olmo 3 7B base checkpoint.
allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from the allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B pretrained checkpoint and continues with Think-SFT post-training.
Initialized from a long-context (64K, YaRN extension) variant of the Olmo-3 7B base; the released Olmo-3-1025-7B is the public artifact for this base lineage.
Olmo 3 7B Think-SFT is initialized from the long-context-extended Olmo 3 7B base (Stage 3 output) before supervised fine-tuning on Dolci Think SFT data.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is the SFT checkpoint warm-started from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base, per the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B model family table.
Think 7B SFT continues post-training from the 7B base checkpoint Olmo-3-1025-7B.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base checkpoint per the Olmo 3 model family table that lists Olmo-3-7B as the Base for the 7B Think track.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is the Think-track SFT release initialized from the base OLMo-3 7B checkpoint.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is the SFT checkpoint produced by supervised finetuning the Olmo-3-1025-7B base model on the Dolci Think SFT mixture.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from a long-context (64K Yarn) variant of the OLMo-3 7B base checkpoint (path olmo25_7b_lc_64k_6T_M100B_round5...step11921), which corresponds in the lattice to the released allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B base.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from a long-context (64k yarn) variant of the OLMo 3 7B base (allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B); the script's CHECKPOINT path points at this LC intermediate.
Think-SFT initializes from the long-context yarn midtraining checkpoint step11921 of OLMo 3 7B Base (allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B).

allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was warm-started from the 7B base checkpoint allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B, then supervised-finetuned for two epochs with a learning-rate sweep and a final souped checkpoint produced via mergekit.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is initialized from the Olmo-3-1025-7B base checkpoint per the Model Family table, then supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture.
Olmo 3 7B Think SFT warm-starts from the Olmo 3 7B (1025) long-context base checkpoint per §4.2 ("a resource for finetuning the base model") and Appendix A.6.1.
SFT initialised from the OLMo 2.5 7B long-context base checkpoint (yarn-fullonly, step11921), the upstream OLMo-3 7B base.
Think SFT initializes from the 7B long-context base checkpoint (olmo25_7b_lc_64k yarn-fullonly), which is the OLMo-3 7B base released as allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B.

anchor_list.excerpt: We train Olmo 3 Think to reason by first generating extended thought sequences and then producing a final answer (Figure 2). To achieve this, we curate high-quality reasoning data (Dolci Think), harness a three-stage training recipe (SFT, DPO, and RLVR)
anchor_list.explanation: Three-stage Think recipe (SFT->DPO->RLVR) starts from Olmo 3 Base 7B (allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B).
Table pins Olmo-3-1025-7B as the base for the 7B Think SFT stage.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT
edges.description: Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on Dolci-Think-SFT-7B, a mixture of math, code, chat, and general knowledge queries.
description_variants: Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on Dolci-Think-SFT-7B, a mixture of math, code, chat, and general knowledge queries.

Olmo 3 Think 7B SFT is supervised-finetuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (~2.27M prompts spanning math, code, chat & safety, precise IF, science, multilingual, identity), described in Section 4.2.1 and Table 17.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the 2,268,178-example Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (the dataset card states 'This dataset was used for 7B post-training').
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (2,268,178 examples, 77.9 GB) — the SFT data designed for the 7B Think branch.
Think SFT 7B is supervised-finetuned on the aggregator Dolci Think SFT 7B mixture (Table 17 totals 2,268,468 prompts).
Olmo 3 7B Think SFT trains on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mix (~2.27M prompts spanning chat & precise IF, math, code, safety, multilingual, and other categories per Table 17).
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (2,268,178 reasoning examples covering math/code/IF/general/safety with <think>...</think> traces).
allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is supervised fine-tuned on the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (~2.27M examples), the Dolci Think SFT recipe used for the OLMo-3 7B Think SFT post-training stage.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mix (local path 'rl-sft-32k/reasoning-mix-decontam-v2-special-tokens-v3-think-FIX').

allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (~2.27M prompt-response pairs after filtering and decontamination) covering chat, math, code, instruction-following, safety, multilingual, and other domains.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is finetuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mix detailed in Table 17 (~2.27M examples spanning Chat, Math, Code, Safety, Multilingual, and Other categories).
Dolci-Think-SFT-7B is the 2.27M-example SFT mixture used to fine-tune Olmo-3-7B (base) into Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT for the 7B Think branch.

The SFT run is fed the local dataset reasoning-mix-decontam-v2-special-tokens-v3-think-FIX, which is the internal preparation of the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture publicly released alongside the OLMo 3 paper.
SFT on the reasoning-mix-decontam-v2-special-tokens-v3-think-FIX dataset (the released Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture, the OLMo-3 Think-track SFT data).
7B Think SFT trained on the aggregator Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (2.27M prompts; Table 17).
Dolci-Think-SFT-7B is the SFT mixture used for Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT post-training; ~2,268,178 train examples total per the dataset_info splits.

Think SFT data is the local 32k-packed 'reasoning-mix-decontam-v2-special-tokens-v3-think-FIX' mix; per the OLMo-3 paper this is released as allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (the official 7B Think SFT mixture).
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (~2.27M reasoning-trace examples) compiled from existing reasoning datasets plus new Ai2-generated prompts and traces.
Trained on the curated Dolci-Think-SFT 7B prompt mixture.
Olmo 3 7B Think SFT is trained on the Dolci Think SFT 7B dataset (~2.27M prompts per Table 17).
Full Dolci-Think-SFT 7B mixture (~2,268,178 examples) is the SFT corpus for allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.

Aggregator-level SFT data: the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture of reasoning traces (OpenThoughts 3, SYNTHETIC-2 SFT-Verified, Nemotron Post-training code, Dolci Think Persona IF, Dolci Precise IF, Dolci Think Python, plus Tulu-3 / OLMo-2 prompts re-generated with R1-style reasoning).
Aggregator-level edge: Olmo 3 7B Think-SFT is trained on Dolci Think SFT 7B (2,268,468 examples) per Table 17. Per-leaf edges follow.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B aggregator mix (~2,268,178 examples).
Think 7B SFT was trained on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture, the AI2-curated SFT mixture for the 7B Think model with 2,268,468 prompts.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is the SFT checkpoint of the Olmo 3 7B Think track and trained on the 2,268,178-example Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture.

Aggregator dataset (~2.27M prompts) used for the 7B Think SFT stage; combines WildChat, OpenAssistant, Persona/Precise IF, OpenThoughts3 math/STEM/code, SYNTHETIC-2, Nemotron Code, Python Algorithms, safety, Aya, TableGPT, and OLMo Identity Prompts.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the full Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (~2.27M examples, 77.9 GB) which is used for 7B post-training per the dataset card and Model Family table.
The 7B Think SFT is trained on the OLMo 3 Think SFT reasoning mix corresponding to the released Dolci-Think-SFT-7B dataset; the script points at a private weka path for this same mix.
Think-SFT trains on the local form of allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (reasoning-mix-decontam-v2-special-tokens-v3-think-FIX). Aggregator's subsets[] is empty in lattice, so no per-leaf edges emitted.

allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT was supervised-finetuned on the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-7B aggregator: ~2.27M filtered prompts with synthetic reasoning traces drawn from chat/precise-IF, math, code, safety, multilingual, and tabular sources (Table 17).
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT is supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (~2.27M examples) — the 7B-specific reasoning-trace SFT corpus.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT consumes the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture as its supervised fine-tuning corpus (2,268,178 examples, 77.9 GB) per Ai2's OLMo 3 release; the Model Family table places this dataset on the SFT row under the Olmo 3 7B Think column.
Aggregator-level SFT mixture (2,268,178 examples) used for Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT post-training stage.
Olmo 3 7B Think SFT is trained on the 2,268,468-example Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mixture (Table 17).

Dolci Think Persona Precise IF subset (223,123 prompts in Table 17) — Persona-IF prompts regenerated as in Tülu 3 with personas from Meyer & Corneil (2025). It is a subset of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B and not a standalone lattice item. Responses generated by QwQ-32B and verifier-filtered.
Dolci Think Precise IF subset (135,792 prompts; Table 17) — overall Tülu 3 precise IF prompts with verifiable constraints from Pyatkin et al. (2025). It is a subset, not a standalone lattice item.

Dolci Think Python Algorithms subset (466,677 prompts) — sourced from AceCoder, Python subset of The Algorithms, Llama Nemotron Post-training, OpenCodeReasoning. Not a standalone lattice artifact (subset of Dolci-Think-SFT-7B); QwQ-32B generates 16 responses per prompt, GPT-4.1 test cases filter for correctness.
SFT trained on the reasoning-mix-decontam-v2-special-tokens-v3-think-FIX dataset, the local form of the Dolci Think SFT 7B mix.
Think SFT trains on the reasoning-mix decontam-v2 special-tokens-v3 think-FIX dataset, which is the public Dolci-Think-SFT-7B reasoning-trace mixture (~2.27M examples).

Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (2,268,178 examples, ODC-BY) is the SFT mixture for Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT; reasoning lives in <think>...</think> with the answer following </think>. Aggregator-level edge — see sibling events for component datasets.
Aggregator: Dolci Think SFT 7B is the curated SFT mixture of 2,268,468 prompts.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT data mix uses Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-32B) at 1.0 weight per the SFT tokenization recipe.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: The 'verifiable-gpt41' slice consumed during Olmo 3 7B midtraining was generated by GPT-4.1 (OpenAI).
description_variants: The 'verifiable-gpt41' slice consumed during Olmo 3 7B midtraining was generated by GPT-4.1 (OpenAI).

GPT-4.1 (alongside o4-mini) was prompted to generate meta-reasoning thinking traces for math/code capability-targeted tasks (Math/Code Meta-Reasoning leaves) and to distill program-verifiable thinking traces, used in Olmo-3-1025-7B midtraining.
Verifiable-QA midtraining data (verifiable-gpt41) consists of GPT-4.1-generated content used directly as training data.

Math Meta-Reasoning and Code Meta-Reasoning thinking traces consumed by Olmo 3 Base 7B were generated by GPT-4.1 (alongside o4-mini), using Pandalla-style annotations as foundation for capability-targeted thinking tasks.
Program-Verifiable thinking traces in 7B midtraining were distilled from GPT-4.1 (with o4-mini), then verifier-filtered.

Math Meta-Reasoning, Code Meta-Reasoning, and Program-Verifiable synthetic thinking-trace subsets of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used to midtrain Olmo-3-1025-7B were generated in part by GPT-4.1 prompted with capability-targeted task annotations.
GPT-4.1 produced thinking-trace generations for Math Meta-Reasoning, Code Meta-Reasoning, and Program-Verifiable used in Olmo 3 7B midtraining.

Dolci-Instruct-SFT (2,152,112-prompt SFT mixture) is the SFT training data for Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT.

The SFT trainer reads its dataset from gs://ai2-llm/jacobm/data/sft/rl-sft-32k/olmo3-32b-instruct-sft-1114, which is the working corpus for the Olmo-3 instruct SFT family aggregated as Dolci-Instruct-SFT.

7B Instruct SFT trains on the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture (the public release counterpart of the rl-sft-32k Instruct SFT data referenced via dataset_path); per the lattice, Dolci-Instruct-SFT is the SFT mixture for OLMo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT.
Dolci Instruct SFT Mixture (2,152,112 samples, ODC-BY) is the SFT data for Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT. Aggregator-level edge — see sibling events for component datasets.

Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT is trained on the Dolci Instruct SFT Mixture, an SFT data aggregator that builds upon the OLMo 2 Instruct mixture and adds new chat, reasoning, function-calling, and science prompts (Table 30).
Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT trains on the Dolci Instruct SFT Mixture (Allen AI's canonical instruct-SFT data for OLMo 3 Instruct).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT
edges.description: Single-agent tool-use SFT supplementary dataset for the Instruct family, declared in the frontmatter datasets list.
description_variants: Single-agent tool-use SFT supplementary dataset for the Instruct family, declared in the frontmatter datasets list.
A simulated-agent variant of the function-calling data (SimFC, ~200K trajectories with LLM-simulated environments) is part of the tool-use SFT corpus for Olmo 3 Instruct (Section 5.2.1, Table 27).

The Share-Alike-licensed slice of the tool-use data (1,604 examples, CC BY-SA 4.0) was part of the tool-use prompts used to SFT Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT; it is released as a separate dataset only for downstream license compatibility.
Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT trained on the 1,604-example CC-BY-SA-4.0 carve-out of the tool-use SFT pool (released separately so the bulk of Dolci-Instruct-SFT can stay ODC-BY).
Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use-SA is a 1,604-example CC-BY-SA-licensed share-alike subset of the tool-use data carved out for Olmo 3 7B Instruct, distributed alongside the full Tool-Use mixture.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT also includes the Sub-Agent (SA) tool-use variant Dolci Instruct SFT Tool-Use-SA in its mixture (alongside the main tool-use dataset).
The CC-BY-SA-licensed 1,604-sample Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use-SA subset is part of the tool-use SFT data flowing into Olmo 3 7B Instruct's SFT stage.

Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use-SA is the CC BY-SA-licensed subset (1,604 examples) of the Dolci tool-use data; its card identifies it as tool-use data 'for Olmo 3 7B Instruct', so its examples flow into the Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT training mixture via the Tool-Use partition.
Dolci Instruct SFT Tool-Use-SA (simulated trajectories).

Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use-SA (CC BY-SA 4.0), a Share-Alike-licensed subset (1,604 examples) of the Dolci Instruct Tool Use data that the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture incorporates; the SA card explicitly identifies this subset as part of the tool-use data for Olmo 3 7B Instruct.
SFT data: Share-Alike (CC BY-SA) licensed tool-use SFT subset (1,604 examples) used together with Dolci-Instruct-SFT for the Instruct-SFT model.

The CC BY-SA share-alike subset of the Tool-Use sub-mix (1,604 examples) is part of the tool-use data prepared for Olmo 3 7B Instruct and is therefore included via the broader Dolci Instruct SFT mixture used to train the SFT checkpoint.
Trained on the Asta-MCP / Science-Agent split of the Dolci tool-use SFT data (real-interaction MCP trajectories on the ASTA Scientific Corpus).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: The omr-rewrite-fullthoughts subset is produced by light GPT-4.1 edits of OpenMathReasoning items for clarity, flow, and LaTeX formatting while preserving all reasoning, explanations, and thoughts of the original.
description_variants: GPT-4.1 lightly rewrote nvidia/OpenMathReasoning items for clarity, flow, and LaTeX formatting (preserving reasoning) to produce the 850M-token OMR Rewrite Full-Thoughts thinking-trace leaf for Olmo-3-1025-7B midtraining.
GPT-4.1 lightly rewrote OpenMathReasoning items (clarity/flow/LaTeX formatting) to produce OMR Rewrite FullThoughts in 7B midtraining.

The 850M-token OMR Rewrite Full-Thoughts subset of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used to midtrain Olmo-3-1025-7B was generated by GPT-4.1 lightly rewriting OpenMathReasoning items for clarity/format while preserving reasoning content.
GPT-4.1 rewrote OpenMathReasoning items for clarity/flow/LaTeX preserving the reasoning, producing the OMR Rewrite Full-Thoughts component used in Olmo 3 7B midtraining.

GPT-4.1 transformed (lightly rewrote) the OpenMathReasoning dataset for clarity, flow and formatting (e.g., LaTeX conversion) preserving all reasoning, producing OMR Rewrite FullThoughts (850M tokens) included in midtraining for allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B.

GPT-4.1 was used (with o4-mini) to generate the Math Meta-Reasoning, Code Meta-Reasoning, and Program-Verifiable thinking-trace midtraining sub-corpora, and to lightly rewrite OpenMathReasoning into OMR Full-Thoughts, consumed by allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B.
Midtraining 7B mix includes verifiable-gpt41 documents (cleaned-documents) where prompts/answers were rewritten/verified using GPT-4.1.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT
edges.description: QwQ-32B regenerated incomplete OpenThoughts3 math reasoning traces with up to 32K tokens, generated up to 16 code completions per prompt for Dolci Think Python Algorithms, and produced precise-instruction-following responses (verified per constraint) that populate the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mix used to train Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.
description_variants: QwQ-32B regenerated incomplete OpenThoughts3 math reasoning traces with up to 32K tokens, generated up to 16 code completions per prompt for Dolci Think Python Algorithms, and produced precise-instruction-following responses (verified per constraint) that populate the Dolci-Think-SFT-7B mix used to train Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT.
QwQ-32B generates full reasoning chains and solutions for incomplete OpenThoughts3 prompts used in Think SFT 7B (math/STEM/code subsets).
QwQ-32B generates up to 16 candidate completions per prompt for the Dolci Think Python Algorithms subset used in Think SFT 7B.
QwQ-32B generates responses for precise instruction-following prompts (verified by per-constraint verifiers) used in Think SFT 7B.
Reasoning traces for incomplete OpenThoughts3 math examples in Dolci-Think-SFT-7B are regenerated by QwQ-32B (the original model used by OpenThoughts3 authors), with up to 32K tokens.
Code completions for Dolci-Think-SFT-7B (Dolci Think Python Algorithms and OpenThoughts3 code regen) are generated by QwQ-32B (up to 16 responses per prompt).
Precise-IF responses (Dolci Think Persona Precise IF, Dolci Think Precise IF) for Dolci-Think-SFT-7B are generated by QwQ-32B and kept only if all constraints are satisfied.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT
edges.description: Olmo 3 7B Instruct-SFT is initialized from the Olmo 3 7B Think-SFT checkpoint to give the Instruct training a 'warm-start'; Table 29 reports a +3.3 average-point gain for Instruct SFT trained with thinking SFT first vs without.
description_variants: Olmo 3 7B Instruct-SFT is initialized from the Olmo 3 7B Think-SFT checkpoint to give the Instruct training a 'warm-start'; Table 29 reports a +3.3 average-point gain for Instruct SFT trained with thinking SFT first vs without.
Olmo 3 Instruct SFT is initialized from the Olmo 3 Think SFT checkpoint to provide a warm-start; this significantly improves Instruct performance per Table 29.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct-SFT is initialized from the Olmo 3 7B Think-SFT checkpoint as a 'warm-start'. The team found this significantly improves performance (Table 29).
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT is initialized from Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT (warm-start) before SFT on Dolci-Instruct-SFT; this yields significant gains over training from base.
Per Section 5.2.2 and Figure 2, the Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT model is initialized from the Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT checkpoint (warm-start) before SFT on Dolci-Instruct-SFT.

Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT is warm-started from Olmo 3 7B Think SFT, not from Olmo 3 Base directly. Section 5.5 reports this strategy yields gains across benchmarks while keeping responses succinct without remnants of thinking traces.
Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT warm-starts from the Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT checkpoint (Sec 5.2.2).
Olmo 3 Instruct 7B SFT initializes weights from Olmo 3 Think SFT 7B checkpoint as a thinking-warm-start.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT is initialized from the Olmo 3 7B Think SFT checkpoint (warm-start), which significantly improves Instruct performance per Table 29.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT initializes from Olmo 3 7B Think SFT for warm-start.
Olmo 3 Instruct 7B SFT is warm-started from the Olmo 3 Think 7B SFT checkpoint, which the paper reports yields significant Instruct-stage performance gains.
OLMo 3 Instruct SFT for the 7B variant warm-starts from the Olmo 3 Think SFT checkpoint at the same scale, which significantly improves Instruct benchmark scores (Table 29).
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT warm-starts from Olmo 3 7B Think SFT (§5.2.2). Table 29 shows With-thinking-SFT-first averages 47.8 vs 44.5 No-thinking-SFT.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT
edges.description: Function-calling SFT data is included via the Dolci Instruct SFT Tool-Use mixture (227,579 tool-use prompts per Table 30; combines Science QA, Web Search QA, and SimFC trajectories described in Section 5.2.1).
description_variants: Function-calling SFT data is included via the Dolci Instruct SFT Tool-Use mixture (227,579 tool-use prompts per Table 30; combines Science QA, Web Search QA, and SimFC trajectories described in Section 5.2.1).
Dolci Instruct Tool Use contributes 227,579 tool-calling prompts to the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture; the Tool-Use sub-release is itself a constituent of the larger SFT mix.
Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use, an Ai2-authored 227,579-prompt tool-calling dataset released alongside Olmo 3, was bundled into the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture used to SFT Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT.
Dolci Instruct Tool Use (227,579 SFT prompts) is the function-calling SFT subset combining real-MCP and SimFC trajectories per Table 27.
7B Instruct SFT mix includes the Dolci Tool Use subset (227,579 SFT prompts, see Table 30) covering both real-MCP and SimFC trajectories.

Constituent of the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture introduced for Olmo 3: Dolci Instruct Tool Use, 227,579 prompts of multi-turn tool-use samples; the tool-use companion card states this data is used for the Olmo 3 Instruct models.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct-SFT trains on the Dolci Instruct SFT Tool Use subset (~227K prompts of synthesized tool-use trajectories combining Science QA, Web Search QA, and SimFC data).
Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT used 227,579 prompts from allenai/Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use as a sub-corpus of the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture (tool-use SFT subset released as a separate Dolci dataset).

Dolci Instruct Tool Use (allenai/Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use, 227,579 prompts) contributed the new tool-use training data folded into the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture used to fine-tune Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT.
allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT SFT mix uses ~228K Dolci Instruct Tool Use trajectories combining real-MCP (Science QA, Web Search QA) and simulated (SimFC) function-calling data.
Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use, the new tool-use SFT subset, contributed 227,579 multi-turn function-calling prompts to Dolci-Instruct-SFT.
Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT trained on the 227,579 multi-turn function-calling prompts in Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use (released as a separate HF dataset and bundled into the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture).

Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT trained on Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use including the 1,604-example Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use-SA subset (CC BY-SA-licensed sub-corpus republished separately for license-compatibility).
Dolci-Instruct-SFT contains 227,579 prompts from Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use (function-calling trajectories aggregating Science QA, Web Search QA, and SimFC).
allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT consumes the allenai/Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use prompt set as part of Dolci-Instruct-SFT (Table 30: 227,579 prompts).

Component of the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture used for Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT supervised fine-tuning. Dolci Instruct Tool Use sub-corpus: 227,579 tool-use prompts bundled in as a component of the SFT mix.
Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT trained on 227,579 Dolci Instruct Tool Use prompts (the released allenai/Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use sub-mix).
The Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use dataset (the released ODC-BY tool-use sub-mix, 227,579 examples) is consumed by the Olmo 3 Instruct SFT stage as the tool-use portion of its training data.
Dolci Instruct Tool Use (Ai2's new tool-use SFT corpus, 227,579 prompts) is bundled into the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture and trained on by Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT.
Dolci Instruct Tool Use (227,579 prompts) is a leaf source in Dolci Instruct SFT, comprising the new tool-use trajectories collected for Olmo 3 Instruct.

Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT was trained on 227,579 tool-use prompts from the Dolci Instruct SFT Tool Use sub-corpus released as allenai/Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use (ODC-BY) — the new tool-use data shipped for the Olmo 3 Instruct line.
Function-calling tool use SFT data.
Dolci Instruct Tool Use, the new tool-use SFT data released by Ai2 as a component of the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture, contributing 227,579 prompts.
Per-leaf: 227,579 Dolci Instruct Tool Use examples (function-calling SFT data) contribute to Dolci-Instruct-SFT.
The newly-released Dolci Instruct Tool-Use sub-mix contributed 227,579 tool-use / function-calling prompts to the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture.
Dolci Instruct Tool Use component (227,579 prompts) — Ai2-built tool-use corpus included in the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture for tool-calling capability.
Dolci Instruct Tool Use (Other category, 227,579 prompts) is a leaf prompt source in the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture (Table 30).
Trained on the Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use subset (227,579 prompts in Table 30) bundling SimFC + Web Search QA + Science QA function-calling trajectories.
Listed in Table 30 as a Dolci-Instruct-SFT prompt sub-corpus contributing 227,579 prompts to the SFT mixture.
The newly released Dolci Instruct Tool Use sub-corpus (227,579 prompts) was included in the SFT mixture; this is bundled as a sibling release of the parent Dolci-Instruct-SFT.
Dolci Instruct Tool Use contributed 227,579 prompts (the new tool-use data for Olmo 3 Instruct models) to the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT trained on allenai/Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use (227,579 prompts in SFT mix; Table 30) — Dolci Instruct Tool Use leaf
Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use, the new Ai2 tool-use prompt split for Olmo 3 Instruct, contributes 227,579 prompts to the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture.
Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT trained on the Dolci Instruct Tool-Use sub-dataset — 227,579 tool-call prompts/responses (function_calls, functions schema), bundled into the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT is trained on Dolci Instruct SFT Tool Use, the function-calling SFT subset combining Science QA, Web Search QA, and SimFC trajectories (Section 5.2.1, Table 27).
Table 30 lists Dolci Instruct SFT Tool Use as an SFT prompt source contributing 227,579 prompts to the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture used to fine-tune Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT.

Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT trained on the 1,604-example Share-Alike subset of the Dolci Instruct Tool Use data (CC BY-SA 4.0); released as a separate sub-dataset because its license requires share-alike redistribution.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT
edges.description: Science QA function-calling trajectories in the Dolci Instruct SFT Tool-Use mix were generated by an agent based on GPT-4.1-mini equipped with the ASTA Scientific Corpus MCP server.
description_variants: Science QA function-calling trajectories in the Dolci Instruct SFT Tool-Use mix were generated by an agent based on GPT-4.1-mini equipped with the ASTA Scientific Corpus MCP server.
Science QA tool-use trajectories were generated by a GPT-4.1-mini agent equipped with the ASC MCP server.
Tool-use Science QA trajectories used in Olmo 3 7B Instruct-SFT are synthesized by a GPT-4.1-mini agent equipped with the ASC MCP server (Section 5.2.1).

Science QA function-calling trajectories in allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT's SFT mix were synthesized by a GPT-4.1-mini agent equipped with the ASTA Scientific Corpus MCP server (8 functions over Semantic Scholar metadata + paper content).

Tool-use Science QA trajectories in Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use were synthesized by a GPT-4.1-mini agent driving the ASC scientific-corpus tool, providing real MCP environment outputs that train Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT.

GPT-4.1-mini powers an agent equipped with the ASTA Scientific Corpus (ASC) MCP server that produces Science QA trajectories (paper-content and citation-graph queries) used in the Dolci Instruct SFT Tool Use subset.
Science QA trajectories in the allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT tool-use mix are generated by a GPT-4.1-mini agent.
GPT-4.1-mini agent (with ASC MCP) generated Science QA tool-use trajectories included in Dolci Instruct SFT.
GPT-4.1-mini was used (with the ASC MCP server) to generate the 22.6K Science QA tool-use trajectories that feed into Instruct SFT.
GPT-4.1-mini generates Science QA tool-use trajectories.

(Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT consumes Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use.) Science QA tool-use trajectories within Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use are generated by an agent based on GPT-4.1-mini equipped with the ASTA Scientific Corpus MCP server.
Science QA function-calling trajectories that train Olmo 3 Instruct 7B SFT are produced by a GPT-4.1-mini agent with the ASC MCP server.
Science QA tool-use trajectories in Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use are produced by an agent based on GPT-4.1-mini equipped with the ASTA Scientific Corpus (ASC) MCP server.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT's Science QA function-calling trajectories are generated by a GPT-4.1-mini agent equipped with the ASTA Scientific Corpus MCP server (§5.2.1, §A.7.2).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT
edges.description: Web Search QA function-calling trajectories were generated by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API; GPT-5 was also used to filter queries down to those requiring search and having long-form verifiable answers.
description_variants: Web Search QA function-calling trajectories were generated by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API; GPT-5 was also used to filter queries down to those requiring search and having long-form verifiable answers.
SimFC simulated tool-use trajectories are also generated by GPT-5.
SimFC simulated trajectories were generated by GPT-5; GPT-5 also drives the Web Search QA agent and rates queries for filtering.
Web Search QA trajectories in the tool-use SFT data are generated by a GPT-5 agent with the Serper API; GPT-5 is also used to filter queries and summarize webpages (Section 5.2.1, A.7.2).
Web Search QA function-calling trajectories in allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT's SFT mix were synthesized by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API (Google-search + page-fetch tools).
Citation-graph and content-based Science-QA queries were templated and generated by GPT-5 (few-shot templating + a GPT-5 ASC agent for content questions) before tool-use trajectories were collected.
Web-Search-QA tool-use trajectories were generated by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API search/browse tools and the ASC scientific snippet retrieval tool.

GPT-5 is used to filter Web Search QA queries (keeping only those that require search and have long-form verifiable responses) and to generate Web Search QA trajectories with the Serper API. GPT-5 is also one of the LLMs used to synthesize SimFC trajectories.
Web Search QA trajectories in the allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT tool-use mix are generated by a GPT-5 agent (with Serper API).
SimFC simulated function-calling trajectories used to train allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT are generated by GPT-5 (one of three OpenAI models).
GPT-5 generated SimFC simulated tool-use trajectories and Web Search QA trajectories included in Dolci Instruct SFT.
GPT-5 (via Serper API) generated the Web Search QA tool-use trajectories (6.6K) and rated/filtered queries; also summarized webpage content used in training data.
GPT-5 generates Web Search QA trajectories.
GPT-5 generates SimFC trajectories.

(Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT consumes Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use.) Web Search QA trajectories within Dolci-Instruct-SFT-Tool-Use are generated by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API for search and web browsing; GPT-5 is also one of the LLMs used to generate SimFC simulated trajectories.
Web Search QA function-calling trajectories are produced by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API search/browse tool.
SimFC simulated tool-use trajectories (200K) are generated by prompting gpt-5 alongside GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-5 to produce entire trajectories with synthetic user queries and environment responses.
Web Search QA tool-use trajectories are produced by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API for Google search and webpage fetching, with GPT-5 also used to filter input queries.
SimFC synthetic function-calling trajectories are also generated with GPT-5, providing the strongest of the three simulators.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT's Science QA queries (citation-graph and content-based) are generated by GPT-5 (§A.7.2 — 'prompting GPT-5 in a few-shot setup' / 'GPT-5-based agent').
Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT's Web Search QA function-calling trajectories are generated by a GPT-5 agent equipped with the Serper API (§5.2.1, §A.7.2). GPT-5 also summarized webpage outputs.
SimFC simulated function-calling trajectories used to train Olmo 3 7B Instruct SFT are generated in part by GPT-5 (§5.2.1).

description_variants: WildChat (302,406 prompts in Table 30) is a Chat & Precise IF source dataset feeding the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture used to SFT Olmo 3 7B Instruct-SFT.

302,406 WildChat prompts (Zhao et al., 2024) were incorporated into the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture; the prompts are the user-side WildChat data while the responses were re-generated by GPT-4.1 (see the generated_by edge). Source pins WildChat at the family/concept level without specifying a size variant, so the address resolves to the WildChat root.
WildChat (302,406 prompts) is the largest chat-style prompt source in the Dolci Instruct SFT mix.
Chat & WildChat: 302,406 prompts in SFT mix from WildChat (Zhao et al., 2024a).

Constituent of the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture: WildChat prompts (302,406; ODC-BY-1.0; Zhao et al., 2024) used with upgraded responses generated by GPT-4.1; source does not pin a WildChat release version, so addressed at the WildChat family root.
Olmo 3 7B Instruct-SFT uses 302,406 WildChat prompts as the chat-data backbone of Dolci Instruct SFT (Table 30).

Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-SFT used 302,406 prompts from WildChat as a sub-corpus of the Dolci Instruct SFT mixture (WildChat prompts whose responses were upgraded by GPT-4.1; Zhao et al. 2024; family-root pin (card does not name a specific WildChat HF leaf)).
WildChat (Zhao et al., 2024) supplied 302,406 prompts to the Dolci-Instruct-SFT mixture, with responses upgraded by GPT-4.1 (the upgraded subset re-licensed under ODC-BY-1.0).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think
edges.description: Olmo 3 Think 32B (final, 750-step OlmoRL) is initialized from Olmo 3 Think 32B DPO and trained on Dolci-Think-RL-32B.
description_variants: Olmo 3 Think 32B (final, 750-step OlmoRL) is initialized from Olmo 3 Think 32B DPO and trained on Dolci-Think-RL-32B.
Olmo-3-32B-Think is initialized from the Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint and continues training with reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) on the Dolci Think RL mixture.
Olmo 3 Think 32B is RLVR-trained from the Think DPO 32B checkpoint (final RL run on top of the DPO checkpoint).
Olmo 3 32B Think (final 3.0) is initialized from Olmo 3 32B Think DPO and trained with OlmoRL for 750 steps. Initial training run; 32B uses the 7B-DPO-filtered prompt mix due to compute constraints.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final RLVR-trained checkpoint) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO and continues with RLVR training on the Dolci-Think-RL-32B prompt mixture.
Olmo 3 32B Think (initial RL release) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO; OlmoRL training proceeds for ~5 days on 224 GPUs with 8 H100 nodes for training and 20 nodes for inference.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (Final Models RLVR row) continues from the Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint per the Model Family table - RLVR is the post-training stage immediately after DPO in the 32B-Think column.
Olmo-3-32B-Think initializes from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO and is finetuned via OlmoRL (Section 4.4.3, Table 24).
The final 32B Think 3.0 model is initialized from the Think-DPO 32B checkpoint and trained with OlmoRL.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final RLVR) continues from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO with an RLVR stage.
32B Think (RLVR 3.0) continues from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint via OlmoRL on Dolci-Think-RL-32B.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final RLVR model) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO per the Olmo-3 family staging (Base → SFT → DPO → RLVR).
The final Olmo-3-32B-Think (RLVR) checkpoint continues training from the Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint per the Model Family table layout (RLVR row follows DPO row in the same 32B Think column).
Final 32B Think model continues RL from the Think-DPO 32B checkpoint.
Olmo 3 32B Think (final Think 3.0 32B) is initialized from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final) initialized from the 32B Think SFT/DPO merge (32b-1e-4-5e-5); the public Olmo-3-32B-Think release follows this RL stage.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (post-RL) is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO and trained via OlmoRL on Dolci-Think-RL.
Olmo 3 32B Think continues RLVR training from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint.
allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think was initialized from the DPO checkpoint allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO; the paper shows DPO is a strictly better RL starting point than SFT (Table 22, Figure 19).

Final Think RL initialized from the prior-stage Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint per the standard RL←DPO pipeline ordering described in the Olmo3 README; local path /weka/oe-adapt-default/hamishi/model_checkpoints/olmo3-merge-32b-1e-4-5e-5/.
Olmo 3 32B Think (Final/3.0) is initialized from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint and trained with OlmoRL.
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final release) is initialized from the merged 32B Think SFT-then-DPO checkpoint (olmo3-merge-32b-1e-4-5e-5) and continued with GRPO RL.

Initialized from the merged 32B Think DPO checkpoint at /weka/oe-adapt-default/hamishi/model_checkpoints/olmo3-merge-32b-1e-4-5e-5/olmo3-merge-32b-1e-4-5e-5/ (the Think-DPO merge of 1e-4/5e-5 SFT base sweeps).
Olmo-3-32B-Think (final RLVR) initializes from Think-DPO.
Olmo-3-32B-Think is produced by running OlmoRL (RLVR) on top of the Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO checkpoint for 750 steps.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Think
edges.description: Olmo 3.1 Think 32B is the extended-RL continuation of the same OlmoRL run for Olmo-3-32B-Think (initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO), trained for an additional ~21 days up to 2300 steps and yielding ~4+ point gains on AIME, ZebraLogic, IFEval and ~20 points on IFBench (Section 4.1.2 / Table 14).
description_variants: Olmo 3.1 Think 32B is the extended-RL continuation of the same OlmoRL run for Olmo-3-32B-Think (initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO), trained for an additional ~21 days up to 2300 steps and yielding ~4+ point gains on AIME, ZebraLogic, IFEval and ~20 points on IFBench (Section 4.1.2 / Table 14).

Olmo-3.1-32B-Think is a continuation of the SAME RL run that produced Olmo-3-32B-Think, which itself initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO; therefore Olmo-3.1-32B-Think also derives from the 32B Think DPO checkpoint.
Olmo-3.1-32B-Think continues the same RL run from the same Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO starting checkpoint, just for more epochs.
Olmo 3.1 32B Think is initialized from Olmo-3-32B-Think-DPO, the same DPO checkpoint as Olmo 3 32B Think; the 3.1 release extends OlmoRL training to about 2,300 steps.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO
edges.description: GPT-4.1 acts as the LLM judge in the delta-aware GPT-judged preference pipeline of Dolci Instruct DPO, modernizing the OLMo 2 / Tulu 3 UltraFeedback pipeline (GPT-4o was the previous judge).
description_variants: GPT-4.1 acts as the LLM judge in the delta-aware GPT-judged preference pipeline of Dolci Instruct DPO, modernizing the OLMo 2 / Tulu 3 UltraFeedback pipeline (GPT-4o was the previous judge).
Delta-aware GPT-judged preference pairs use GPT-4.1 as the LLM judge (modernizing from GPT-4o); the judge selects/ranks chosen vs rejected completions.
Dolci Instruct DPO chosen/rejected pairs are filtered by a GPT-4.1 judge using UltraFeedback judge prompts before training 7B Instruct-DPO (Appendix A.7.4).

GPT-4.1 acted as the LM judge for the delta-aware GPT-judged preference pairs in allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO's DPO data, scoring multiple candidate responses; the worst response was selected as the rejected completion to maximize the quality delta.
GPT-4.1 is the UltraFeedback-style LLM judge that selects chosen/rejected completions from the four-completion pool, producing the GPT-judged delta-aware subset of Dolci-Instruct-DPO.

Delta-aware GPT-judged preference pairs are produced by sampling four model completions per prompt and judging them with a GPT-4.1 judge using the UltraFeedback judge prompts; the worst is selected as rejected and the best as chosen.
GPT-4.1 judges and selects chosen/rejected preference pairs in the delta-aware GPT-judged subset of allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO's DPO data.
GPT-4.1 acts as LLM judge selecting chosen/rejected responses with UltraFeedback prompts in Dolci Instruct DPO.
GPT-4.1 serves as the LLM-as-judge that ranks the four sampled completions (with UltraFeedback judge prompts) for the GPT-judged delta-aware preference pair subset of Dolci Instruct DPO.
GPT-4.1 acts as judge filter for delta-aware preference pairs.

(Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO consumes Dolci-Instruct-DPO.) GPT-4.1 acts as the LLM judge selecting chosen vs rejected pairs in the GPT-judged subset of Dolci-Instruct-DPO using UltraFeedback judge prompts.
Dolci Instruct DPO additionally uses GPT-4.1 as the LLM judge (upgraded from GPT-4o) to label delta-aware preference pairs.

Delta-aware GPT-judged DPO pairs (§5.3.1) are scored/binarized by a GPT-4.1 LLM judge (UltraFeedback judge prompts). The judge selects the worst response as rejected and the best as chosen; this filters preference pairs used to train Olmo 3 7B Instruct DPO.

For each prompt, we sample four model completions and judge them via a GPT-4.1 judge with the UltraFeedback judge prompts ... we enforce our judge pipeline to sample responses from exactly two of the following smaller and/or previous generation models which show lower overall performance: OLMo 2-1B-Instruct, OLMo 2-7B-Instruct, Yi-9B, Yi-34B, Phi4-Mini-Instruct, Qwen3-0.6B (no reasoning), Qwen3-1.7B (no reasoning).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT
edges.description: Olmo 3 Think 32B SFT is supervised-finetuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (~2.25M prompts spanning math, code, chat & safety, precise IF, science, multilingual, identity), described in Section 4.2.1 and Table 17.
description_variants: Olmo 3 Think 32B SFT is supervised-finetuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (~2.25M prompts spanning math, code, chat & safety, precise IF, science, multilingual, identity), described in Section 4.2.1 and Table 17.

Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT supervised fine-tuning on the Dolci Think SFT mixture for the 32B Think variant. Frontmatter cites the parent concept allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT (no size pinned); the 32B-suffixed leaf is the lattice address that matches the model's size context. Dataset covers math, code, chat, and general-knowledge queries. (Note: the body 'Stage 1: SFT' section names 'Dolci-Think-SFT-7B' / 'Dolci-Instruct-SFT-7B', which appears to be a copy-paste artifact from the 7B card; the 32B variant is the principled lattice address for a 32B model card.)

Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the 2,253,684-example Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture; the card states this dataset was used for 32B post-training and the model-family table places Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT in the 32B Think SFT slot.
Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (2,253,684 examples, 77.7 GB), the SFT data prepared for the 32B Think branch.
Think SFT 32B is supervised-finetuned on the aggregator Dolci Think SFT 32B mixture (Table 17 totals 2,253,916 prompts).

Olmo 3 32B Think SFT trains on the 32B-specific Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mix (~2.25M prompts with similar composition to the 7B mix; Table 17). Pre-32B training, responses with non-Olmo identities and irrelevant prompts (e.g., image generation) are filtered.

Aggregator-level edge: the supervised fine-tuning corpus for Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT is the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (2,253,684 examples, 77.7 GB, ODC-BY licensed; <think> reasoning traces with no <answer> tags).
allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT is supervised fine-tuned on the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (~2.25M examples), the Dolci Think SFT recipe used for the OLMo-3 32B Think SFT post-training stage.
Trained on the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mix at gs://ai2-llm/jacobm/data/sft/rl-sft-32k/olmo3-32b-thinking-sft.

allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (~2.27M prompt-response pairs after filtering and decontamination) covering chat, math, code, instruction-following, safety, multilingual, and other domains.
Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT is the consumer of the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (2,253,684 examples) - the aggregator used for 32B SFT post-training.
Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT is finetuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mix (Table 17, ~2.25M examples). Prior to 32B training, responses with non-Olmo model identities and irrelevant prompts are removed.
32B Think SFT trained on the aggregator Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (2.25M prompts; Table 17, with identity-filtered subset).
Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (2,253,684 reasoning examples) is the supervised fine-tuning mixture for Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT.

Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (2,253,684 examples, ODC-BY licensed) per the dataset card statement that this dataset was used for 32B post-training.
Trained on the curated Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture.

Aggregator-level SFT data: the public Dolci-Think-SFT-32B reasoning-trace mixture (structurally similar to the 7B variant with slightly different mixture ratios).
Aggregator-level edge: Olmo 3 32B Think-SFT is trained on the Dolci Think SFT 32B mix (2,253,916 examples). Per-leaf edges follow.

allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT was supervised-finetuned on the allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT-32B aggregator: ~2.27M filtered prompts with synthetic reasoning traces drawn from chat/precise-IF, math, code, safety, multilingual, and tabular sources (Table 17).

Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT is supervised-fine-tuned on the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (~2.25M examples) — the 32B-specific reasoning-trace SFT corpus (the bare allenai/Dolci-Think-SFT URL redirects to this 32B dataset).

Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT consumes the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (2,253,684 examples, 77.7 GB) as its supervised fine-tuning corpus per Ai2's OLMo 3 release; the Model Family table places this dataset on the SFT row under the Olmo 3 32B Think column.
Aggregator-level SFT mixture (2,253,684 examples) used for Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT post-training stage; canonical 'Dolci-Think-SFT' release.
Olmo 3 32B Think SFT is trained on the 2,253,916-example Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (Table 17).
Dolci Think Persona Precise IF (220,530 prompts; Table 17) — Persona-IF subset of Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (subset of parent dataset; not a standalone artifact).
Dolci Think Precise IF (135,722 prompts; Table 17) — subset of Dolci-Think-SFT-32B based on Tülu 3 precise IF prompts with extra verifiable constraints (Pyatkin et al., 2025).

Dolci Think Python Algorithms (466,676 prompts; Table 17) — code subset of Dolci-Think-SFT-32B sourced from AceCoder, The Algorithms (Python), Nemotron Post-training, and OpenCodeReasoning; QwQ-32B generates completions filtered by GPT-4.1 test cases.
Think-SFT trains on data at gs://ai2-llm/jacobm/data/sft/rl-sft-32k/olmo3-32b-thinking-sft, the 32B thinking SFT mix corresponding to Dolci-Think-SFT-32B.

Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (2,253,684 examples, ODC-BY) is the SFT mixture for Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT; reasoning lives in <think>...</think> with the answer following </think>. Aggregator-level edge — see sibling events for component datasets.
Aggregator: Dolci Think SFT 32B is the curated SFT mixture (2,253,916 prompts).

Aggregator dataset (~2.25M prompts) used for the 32B Think SFT stage; same composition as Dolci Think SFT 7B with 32B-specific identity filtering.
Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT was supervised-fine-tuned on the full Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mixture (~2.25M examples, 77.7 GB) per the dataset card and Model Family table.

description_variants: Qwen3-8B contributed responses to the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool in BOTH no-reasoning ('qwen3-no_reasoning-8b', 2,499,075 responses) and reasoning ('qwen3-reasoning-8b', 2,233,012 responses) modes.

Qwen/Qwen3-8B contributed responses (chosen and/or rejected) to the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool from which allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO's DPO preference pairs were drawn (source config: qwen3-{no_reasoning,reasoning}-8b configs (both thinking modes)).
GPT-judged DPO pool for 7B Instruct-DPO includes Qwen3-8B (no reasoning) (Appendix A.7.4).

Qwen/Qwen3-8B contributed responses to the Dolci DPO Model Response Pool (configs: qwen3-no_reasoning-8b, qwen3-reasoning-8b); these responses were filtered into chosen/rejected pairs in Dolci-Instruct-DPO and so generated training data for Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO. Qwen3-8B (no-reasoning mode) generated up to 2.50M responses; Qwen3-8B (reasoning/thinking mode) generated up to 2.23M responses; same checkpoint as the no-reasoning entry, run with thinking enabled.

This generator's responses to ~2.5M shared prompts populate the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool, from which chosen/rejected completions for Dolci-Instruct-DPO (the DPO training mixture for Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO) were drawn. Pool configs 'qwen3-no_reasoning-8b' and 'qwen3-reasoning-8b' (same lattice leaf, two inference modes).

Qwen/Qwen3-8B (both reasoning and no-reasoning sampling configurations) is a generator in the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool (config 'qwen3-no_reasoning-8b / qwen3-reasoning-8b'); produced up to ~2.5M chat responses to Dolci-Instruct-SFT and WildChat prompts that fed into Dolci-Instruct-DPO chosen/rejected pair construction for Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO preference tuning.
Qwen3-8B contributed sampled completions to the prompt pool whose outputs are judged by GPT-4.1 to form the delta-aware GPT-judged subset of Dolci-Instruct-DPO.

Qwen3 8B (no-reasoning mode) (config 'qwen3-no_reasoning-8b') generated up to 2,499,075 candidate responses for the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool, which provided chosen/rejected candidates for the Dolci-Instruct-DPO preference pairs used to train Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO.

Qwen3 8B (reasoning/thinking mode) (config 'qwen3-reasoning-8b') generated up to 2,233,012 candidate responses for the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool, which provided chosen/rejected candidates for the Dolci-Instruct-DPO preference pairs used to train Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO.
Qwen3 8B in no_reasoning mode generated ~2,499,075 responses across the prompt pool.
Qwen3 8B in reasoning mode generated ~2,233,012 responses across the prompt pool.
Qwen3-8B (no reasoning) generates DPO-pair completions.

Qwen3 8B sampled in both no-reasoning and reasoning modes produced responses (config qwen3-no_reasoning-8b + qwen3-reasoning-8b) in the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool; these responses became chosen/rejected candidates assembled into the Dolci-Instruct-DPO preference mixture used to preference-tune Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO.

Qwen3 8B used in both no_reasoning and reasoning (thinking) modes; same checkpoint contributed responses (~2,499,075 (no_reasoning) + 2,233,012 (reasoning) per inference mode) to the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool (config 'qwen3-no_reasoning-8b / qwen3-reasoning-8b'); these responses became chosen/rejected candidates in the Dolci-Instruct-DPO preference pairs that DPO-trained Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO.

Qwen/Qwen3-8B generated candidate completions (2,499,075 (no-reasoning) + 2,233,012 (reasoning) responses, config `qwen3-no_reasoning-8b/qwen3-reasoning-8b`) that became part of the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool from which allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO's preference pairs were drawn. Role: Qwen3 8B in both no-reasoning and reasoning modes (`qwen3-no_reasoning-8b` and `qwen3-reasoning-8b` configs).
Qwen3 8B (configs qwen3-no_reasoning-8b and qwen3-reasoning-8b) generated responses in the Dolci DPO Model Response Pool.
(Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO consumes Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool.) Qwen3-8B is one of the DPO response pool generators.

Qwen3-8B in no-reasoning mode (qwen3-no_reasoning-8b config, ~2.50M responses) is one of 29 generator models populating the Dolci DPO Model Response Pool feeding Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO preference pairs.

Qwen3-8B in reasoning (thinking-on) mode (qwen3-reasoning-8b config, ~2.23M responses) is one of 29 generator models populating the Dolci DPO Model Response Pool feeding Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO preference pairs.

Qwen3 8B (qwen3-no_reasoning-8b and qwen3-reasoning-8b configs; both thinking modes) generated prompt-response pairs in the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool that feeds Dolci-Instruct-DPO DPO training of Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO.

Qwen3-8B used in BOTH no-reasoning and reasoning modes: contributed responses to the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool (config 'qwen3-{no_reasoning,reasoning}-8b', ~2.5M responses), which is the candidate-response pool for OLMo 3 DPO preference pairs feeding the Dolci-Instruct-DPO mixture trained by Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO.

Qwen3-8B (both no-reasoning and reasoning/thinking configurations) contributed responses to the Dolci-DPO-Model-Response-Pool used to construct Delta-Learning preference pairs for Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO; ~2.50M no-reasoning + ~2.23M reasoning responses.

Producer model Qwen/Qwen3-8B (config slug 'qwen3-no_reasoning-8b+qwen3-reasoning-8b') generated up to ~2.5M responses included in the Dolci DPO Model Response Pool, which underlies allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO's DPO training data. Mode: both reasoning and non-reasoning configs.

Qwen3-8B is one of the models in the completion pool used to generate candidate responses for the GPT-4.1-judged subset of Dolci Instruct DPO preference pairs (A.7.4 model pool for LLM-judged DPO preference pairs).

Qwen3-8B contributed responses to the response pool in both reasoning and no-reasoning modes. Selected responses became chosen or rejected completions in the Dolci Instruct DPO Mixture used to preference-tune Olmo-3-7B-Instruct-DPO.

edges.description: WildChat-1M supplied 83,054 prompts (a subset of the original after filtering) to Dolci-Think-SFT-7B, paired with new reasoning traces generated by DeepSeek R1 / R1 0528.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think
edges.description: Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over the 556,095-prompt candidate pool; per-prompt pass rates from these completions decided which prompts entered the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture. Filter signal recorded as the released dataset allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO (HF; splits coding/general/if/math/puzzle).
description_variants: Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over the 556,095-prompt candidate pool; per-prompt pass rates from these completions decided which prompts entered the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture. Filter signal recorded as the released dataset allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO (HF; splits coding/general/if/math/puzzle).

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated ~4.35M completions (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO) over the candidate prompt pool; per-prompt pass-rates from these rollouts decided inclusion via difficulty-based filtering when constructing the Dolci-Think-RL-7B prompt set used to RLVR-train Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo 3 7B Think DPO checkpoint is used as an offline-difficulty filter for Dolci-Think-RL-7B prompts: 8 rollouts per prompt at temperature 1.0 / top-p 1.0; prompts with pass-rate > 62.5% are removed from the RL training pool.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO) over 556,095 prompts; this dataset is what Dolci-Think-RL-7B was constructed from, so the DPO model decided final inclusion of prompts in the RL training data Olmo-3-7B-Think trains on.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO produced 4,345,797 rollout completions over 556,095 candidate prompts (released as allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO with passrate per prompt); these passrate signals were used to filter easy data out of the candidate pool, yielding the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B RL mixture that Olmo-3-7B-Think trained on.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over 556,095 candidate RL prompts (recorded in allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO); pass-rate from these completions was used to filter easy data, and the resulting Dolci-Think-RL-7B was constructed from this completion pool.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over the 556,095 candidate prompts in the Dolci-Think-RL construction pool; the dataset card states this is explicitly the dataset from which Dolci-Think-RL was constructed via difficulty filtering of easy data.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO produced the Dolci-Think-Completions-DPO rollout pool (556,095 prompts × multiple completions); the Dolci-Think-RL-7B prompt set was constructed by filtering this pool for difficulty (passrate-based easy-data removal).

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO served as the second-stage difficulty filter: its 4.35M rollouts over 556,095 candidate prompts (released as Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO) were the basis for selecting the 102,014 prompts that ultimately formed Dolci-Think-RL-7B used to RL-train Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO served as the final rollout model for difficulty filtering: 4,345,797 completions over 556,095 prompts; per-prompt passrate decided inclusion in Dolci-Think-RL-7B (102,014 prompts), which Olmo-3-7B-Think trained on.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over 556,095 candidate prompts (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO); rollout pass-rates were used to construct the final Dolci-Think-RL mixture used to RLVR-train Olmo-3-7B-Think. Card states 'It is the dataset we constructed Dolci-Think-RL from!'

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over 556,095 candidate prompts; these completions were the input from which Dolci-Think-RL-7B was constructed via easy-data filtering, so the DPO checkpoint decided inclusion in Olmo-3-7B-Think's RL mixture.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over 556,095 candidate prompts; per-prompt passrate / total_correct_rollouts metrics from those completions were used to filter easy data when constructing Dolci-Think-RL-7B, the RLVR training mixture for Olmo-3-7B-Think.
Offline difficulty filtering for the 7B Think RL run dropped prompts the Olmo 3 7B Think DPO model already solved with pass rate >62.5% from 8 rollouts.

allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO produced 4,345,797 completions over 556,095 candidate prompts (released as allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO); per-prompt pass-rate over these completions was used as a difficulty filter when curating Dolci-Think-RL-7B, the final RLVR set used to train allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO generated 4,345,797 completions over 556,095 candidate prompts (released as Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO); pass-rate from those completions was used as the final difficulty filter that produced the Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture Olmo-3-7B-Think trained on.

Pass-rate signal from Olmo-3-7B-Think-DPO's 4.35M rollouts (released as allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-DPO) decided which prompts survived the difficulty filter; surviving prompts assemble Dolci-Think-RL-7B that Olmo-3-7B-Think trains on.

Offline difficulty filtering: 8 rollouts are generated for each prompt from the 7B Think DPO checkpoint, and prompts whose pass rate exceeds 62.5% are removed before RL training to improve sample efficiency.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think
edges.description: Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over the 636,095-prompt candidate pool; per-prompt pass rates from these completions decided which prompts entered the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture. Filter signal recorded as the released dataset allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT (HF; splits coding/general/if/math/puzzle).
description_variants: Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over the 636,095-prompt candidate pool; per-prompt pass rates from these completions decided which prompts entered the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture. Filter signal recorded as the released dataset allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT (HF; splits coding/general/if/math/puzzle).

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated ~5.03M completions (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT) over the candidate prompt pool; pass-rates decided inclusion via difficulty-based filtering when constructing the Dolci-Think-RL-7B prompt set used to RLVR-train Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT) over 636,095 prompts, and the per-prompt passrate was used to filter easy data out of the Dolci-Think-RL-7B prompt pool that Olmo-3-7B-Think then RL-trained on.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT produced 5,031,398 rollout completions over 636,095 candidate prompts (released as allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT with passrate per prompt); these passrate signals were used to filter easy data out of the candidate pool, yielding the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B RL mixture that Olmo-3-7B-Think trained on.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over 636,095 candidate RL prompts (recorded in allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT); these pass-rate signals were used to filter easy data from the pool that became Dolci-Think-RL-7B.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over the 636,095 candidate prompts considered when building Dolci-Think-RL; these completions were used as a difficulty filter (removing easy data) when constructing Dolci-Think-RL-7B, the RL training set for Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT produced the Dolci-Think-Completions-SFT rollout pool (636,095 prompts × multiple completions, 5,031,398 total); these completions were used to filter easy data out of the prompt set that became Dolci-Think-RL-7B.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT served as the difficulty-filter model: its 5.03M rollouts (passrate / total_correct_rollouts columns) over the 636,095 candidate Dolci-Think-RL prompts were used to drop easy prompts before constructing the final Dolci-Think-RL-7B mix; the rollout artifact is released as Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT served as the rollout model for difficulty filtering of the Dolci-Think-RL-7B candidate prompt pool: 5,031,398 completions over 636,095 prompts, with per-prompt passrate deciding which prompts were retained for the final RL mixture trained on by Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over 636,095 candidate prompts (Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT); rollout pass-rates were used to filter easy prompts from the pool that became Dolci-Think-RL-7B (the RLVR training mixture for Olmo-3-7B-Think).

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over 636,095 candidate prompts; these completions decided which prompts were too easy and were dropped when constructing the Dolci-Think-RL-7B mixture that RL-trained Olmo-3-7B-Think.
Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT acted as a difficulty filter for the Dolci-Think-RL prompt set: prompts on which the SFT model already achieved high pass-rate were removed before RL training.

allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT produced 5,031,398 completions over 636,095 candidate prompts (released as allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT); per-prompt pass-rate over these completions was used as a difficulty filter when curating Dolci-Think-RL-7B, the final RLVR set used to train allenai/Olmo-3-7B-Think.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over the 636,095-prompt candidate pool (released as Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT); pass-rate from those completions was used as a difficulty filter to drop easy prompts during construction of the Dolci-Think-RL-7B RL training mix that Olmo-3-7B-Think consumed.

Pass-rate signal from Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT's 5.03M rollouts (released as allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT) decided which prompts survived the difficulty filter; surviving prompts assemble Dolci-Think-RL-7B that Olmo-3-7B-Think trains on.

Olmo-3-7B-Think-SFT generated 5,031,398 completions over 636,095 candidate RL prompts; per-prompt pass-rates were used to filter 'easy' prompts before constructing Dolci-Think-RL-7B. Materialized in dataset allenai/Dolci-Think-RL-7B-Completions-SFT.

The Nemotron-Math-v2 dataset (350K curated AoPS+StackExchange-Math problems with 7.5M gpt-oss-120b solution traces in three reasoning modes with and without Python TIR) was used as part of the SFT training data for NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16.
Nemotron-Nano-v3's SFT training mixture includes Nemotron-Math-v2 alongside Nemotron-Math-Proofs-v1 (companion Dec 2025 NVIDIA math release).

The NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16 SFT-only checkpoint is supervised fine-tuned on the high-reasoning-mode portion of Nemotron-Math-v2 (the gpt-oss-120b high-reasoning trajectories with and without Python TIR) as the SFT stage of the Nemotron-3 Nano post-training pipeline, prior to additional reinforcement learning.

BF16 was trained on synthetic corpus row 'Synthetic Chat from gpt-oss-120b, Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct-v0.1, Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507 , and Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507' which uses allenai/WildChat-1M as a seed dataset.

BF16 was trained on synthetic corpus row 'Synthetic WildChat-1M and arena-human-preference-140k from DeepSeek-R1, gemma-2-2b-it, gemma-3-27b-it, gpt-oss-20b, gpt-oss-120b, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct-v0.1, Nemotron-4-340B-Instruct, NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-9B-v2, Phi-4-mini-instruct, Phi-3-small-8k-instruct, Phi-3-medium-4k-instruct, Qwen3-235B-A22B, QwQ-32B' which uses allenai/WildChat-1M as a seed dataset.
WildChat user prompts seed the General Chat SFT category.
General Chat SFT domain also draws on WildChat per sft.md. Not directly enumerated in the open-source data_blend_raw.json; emitted at family level per doc.
WildChat-1M provided real user prompts seeding General Chat SFT response generation for Nemotron 3 Nano.
WildChat dataset (Li et al., 2024d) prompts seeded the General Chat SFT subset.
WildChat user prompts feed the General Chat SFT subset.
Post-training conversational corpus.

WildChat-1M prompts flow into Nano-30B-A3B's RL training via the Nemotron-RL-instruction_following component (0.17 of the Nano-RL-Training-Blend), which directly combines WildChat-1M prompts with verifiable instruction templates from Open-Instruct.

NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16 trained on synthetic 'Synthetic WildChat-1M and arena-human-preference-140k' data seeded from WildChat-1M; the synthetic dataset uses WildChat-1M as a content seed before generation.
WildChat-1M prompts were used to seed the SFT General Chat subset.
Nano's General Chat SFT prompts include WildChat (Li et al., 2024d).
WildChat user prompts were used as the basis for general-chat SFT examples in the Nemotron 3 Nano BF16 SFT mixture.

All ~7.5M Nemotron-Math-v2 solution trajectories used to train NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16 were synthesized by gpt-oss-120b across three reasoning effort modes (high/medium/low) with and without Python TIR.

gpt-oss-120b autoformalized natural-language proof problems into Lean 4 theorem statements (formal_statement field) for Nemotron-Math-Proofs-v1, which is part of the SFT data for NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16.

Competition Math SFT data is generated via 'tool-integrated reasoning with GPT-OSS teachers' per sft.md. The Nano3 student SFT model consumes traces synthesised by GPT-OSS teacher models (gpt-oss-120b is the open-weight teacher referenced).
Competition-math SFT data was produced via tool-integrated reasoning with GPT-OSS teachers (the only gpt-oss in the lattice is gpt-oss-120b).

All high-reasoning-mode reasoning traces in the SFT data consumed by the Nemotron-3 Nano BF16 SFT-only checkpoint were generated by gpt-oss-120b (the only generator used to produce Nemotron-Math).
gpt-oss-120b synthesized the 7.5M natural language solutions in Nemotron-Math-v2 (high/medium/low reasoning regimes, with and without Python TIR) used as SFT data for the released model.

All 7.5M long-form reasoning traces in Nemotron-Math are generated by gpt-oss-120b under three reasoning modes (high, medium, low), each both with and without Python tool-integrated reasoning, yielding six configurations with eight solutions per problem (T=1.0, top-p=1.0).

gpt-oss-120b refreshed the SFT competition-math responses (replacing those from Nemotron Nano 2) and generated tool-integrated reasoning traces (Python tools) used as the teacher signal in SFT.
gpt-oss-120b was one of four LLMs simulating roles in synthetic multi-turn tool-use trajectories for the SFT Conversational Tool Use subset.
gpt-oss-120b generated SFT General Chat responses to LMSYS / WildChat prompts and acted as the simulated-user generator for multi-turn extension.
gpt-oss-120b generated responses to the synthetic instruction-following prompts for the SFT subset, filtered to those passing IFEval/IFBench verifiers.
gpt-oss-120b generated tool-integrated Python reasoning traces for the SFT Science subset, with subsequent LLM-judge filtering for format compliance, intent preservation, and quality.
gpt-oss-120b generated synthetic candidate solutions and selection-reasoning verdicts for the GenSelect SFT subset (best-of-N reward modeling).

edges.subject: nvidia/Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni-30B-A3B-Reasoning-BF16
edges.description: BF16 release is built on the Nemotron-3 Nano 30B-A3B LLM backbone (31B-parameter Mamba2-Transformer hybrid MoE with ~3B active parameters), used as the language-model trunk of the omni model.
description_variants: BF16 release is built on the Nemotron-3 Nano 30B-A3B LLM backbone (31B-parameter Mamba2-Transformer hybrid MoE with ~3B active parameters), used as the language-model trunk of the omni model.

The Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni-30B-A3B-Reasoning-BF16 release uses the Nemotron-3-Nano 30B-A3B LLM as its hybrid Mamba2-Transformer MoE backbone; the model card states 'We built on the base model, applying additional training, enhancements, and optimizations on top of it.'

BF16 Omni model uses the NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-BF16 (31B-parameter Mamba2-Transformer hybrid MoE, ~3B active params/token) as its language-model backbone; weights are continued / extended into the Omni multimodal model.

BF16 release built on the Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B BF16 hybrid Mamba2-Transformer MoE language backbone (~3B active parameters per token); the model card states 'We built on the base model, applying additional training, enhancements, and optimizations on top of it.'

edges.subject: nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16
edges.description: Nemotron-Math-v2 (~347K problems, ~7M reasoning trajectories sampled across six reasoning/tool configurations) is SFT training data for the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 master chat.
description_variants: Nemotron-Math-v2 (~347K problems, ~7M reasoning trajectories sampled across six reasoning/tool configurations) is SFT training data for the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 master chat.

Problems in Nemotron-Math-v3 are sourced from nvidia/Nemotron-Math-v2, with reference answers verified against Math-v2; therefore Math-v2 is upstream training-data provenance for the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 chat through Math-v3.
Nemotron-Math-v2 is the upstream English math SFT source whose subsamples are translated into 6 languages to build the math_* splits of Nemotron-SFT-Multilingual-v1.

anchor_list.excerpt: Nemotron-Math-v2 is a large-scale mathematical reasoning dataset containing approximately 347K high-quality mathematical problems and 7M model-generated reasoning trajectories.
anchor_list.explanation: Defines the dataset that feeds Nemotron-3-Super SFT.

anchor_list.excerpt: The problems are sourced from nvidia/Nemotron-Math-v2, which extracted and filtered problems from: AoPS Subset ... StackExchange-Math Subset
anchor_list.explanation: Establishes Nemotron-Math-v2 as the upstream problem source.

anchor_list.excerpt: made by translating a subsample of SFT data from Nemotron-Math-v2, Nemotron-Competitive-Programming-v1, and Nemotron-Science-v1 into to 6 languages
anchor_list.explanation: Identifies Nemotron-Math-v2 as upstream math source.

edges.subject: nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16
edges.description: gpt-oss-120b generated all ~7M reasoning trajectories in Nemotron-Math-v2 under six configurations (high/medium/low reasoning x with/without Python TIR), 8 samples per configuration; these traces are the supervision signal for SFT of the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 chat.
description_variants: gpt-oss-120b generated all ~7M reasoning trajectories in Nemotron-Math-v2 under six configurations (high/medium/low reasoning x with/without Python TIR), 8 samples per configuration; these traces are the supervision signal for SFT of the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 chat.

gpt-oss-120b autoformalized natural-language theorems into Lean 4 statements via an iterative pipeline (initial formalization, Lean 4 compilation check, backtranslation/semantic verification, iterative refinement up to 8 iterations, faithfulness filtering); these formalizations train the Nemotron-3-Super BF16 chat through Nemotron-Math-Proofs-v1.

GPT-OSS-120B generated the GPQA-style MCQA questions and reasoning traces and the RQA synthetic chemistry questions in Nemotron-Science-v1; these synthetic samples are the supervision signal for SFT of the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 chat.
GPT-OSS-120B is one of the frontier generators that produced synthetic chat and instruction-following dialogues (and corresponding responses) in Nemotron-Instruction-Following-Chat-v1.
GPT-OSS-120B synthetically generated the questions and agent skills that constitute the prompt side of Nemotron-SFT-OpenCode-v1.
GPT-OSS-120B is one of six frontier generators producing synthetic dialogues in Nemotron-Instruction-Following-Chat-v2.

Answer content in Nemotron-SpecializedDomains-Finance-v1 was synthetically generated by GPT-OSS-120B, which produced 5 candidate answers per question with different random seeds, grounded in the mapped SEC filing sections, prior to GenSelect filtering.
GPT-OSS-120B simulated multi-role agent interactions in the Interactive Agent subset of Nemotron-Agentic-v1.
GPT-OSS-120B in its low-reasoning mode (Du et al., 2025) generated the low-effort reasoning SFT samples (2% of the SFT data) covering math reasoning, STEM QA, and instruction following.

GPT-OSS-120B paraphrased ~565 SecQue templates into S&P-500/fiscal-year combinations and sampled five candidate answers per question to feed the GenSelect best-of-N answer selection — content for the financial reasoning SFT dataset.
GPT-OSS-120B generated CUDA kernels and reasoning traces alongside DeepSeek-R1 for the 100K-sample CUDA SFT dataset.
gpt-oss-120b played a role in the conversational tool-use SDG pipeline (one of six teacher models).
gpt-oss-120b generated tool-calling data alongside Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507.
gpt-oss-120b generated AoPS-style synthetic content.
gpt-oss-120b generated synthetic Stack Exchange content.

gpt-oss-120b generator.
